name: Nanaimo Bars
recipeInstructions:
For 1st Layer: Place butter, sugar, and cocoa powder in a double boiler over barely simmering water. Stir occasionally until melted. Add egg and continue to cook and thicken. Remove from heat and stir in Graham wafer crumbs, coconut, and almonds. Press firmly into an ungreased 8-inch square pan. Chill.
For 2nd Layer: Cream together butter, cream, and custard powder in a bowl. Gradually beat in icing sugar until light and fluffy. Spread over the first layer. Chill.
For Icing: Melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over barely simmering water (or in a microwave). Stir to combine. Cool to room temperature. Spread evenly over the second layer with a spatula. Chill. Cut into bars. MAKES: 16-24 bars.
